name: wi-medicaid-policy
note: Wisconsin ForwardHealth Online Handbook. Live handbook is a portal app (Display.aspx, AMA/ADA license click-through, no static index). Per-service handbook section PDFs are published at /kw/pdf/<slug>.pdf — curl 200, no login. PDFs are stamped 'Archival Use Only' but are the official published snapshot of the Online Handbook sections.

docs.title: Family Care Guide (HCBS waiver, MCO-certified providers)
Physician Services Handbook — Medicine and Surgery
Durable Medical Equipment & Disposable Medical Supplies (DMS) Handbook
All-Provider Handbook — Covered and Noncovered Services
Laboratory Services (Online Handbook section — portal only)

_comment: ForwardHealth has no static handbook index page — the Online Handbook (Display.aspx) is a 3-dropdown portal (User Type / Program / Service Area) gated by an AMA CPT license agreement. The /kw/pdf/ path hosts per-section archival PDFs with stable slug names (smv, ambulance, home_health, dms, pharmacy_*, phy_*, all_*); curl returns 200 application/pdf with no cookies. NEMT is brokered (Veyo/MTM) — SMV handbook covers FFS specialized-vehicle providers. No standalone Laboratory PDF slug found (lab policy is inside the Physician service area in the portal). ForwardHealth Updates (numbered YYYY-NN.pdf) also live under /kw/pdf/ but are point-in-time bulletins, not the handbook.
